subject: Faster emergency response for Mason Pro Services
body:
Hi,

I was looking at Mason Pro Services and noticed you handle HVAC, plumbing, and electrical, including emergency service. When a customer calls with a burst pipe at 2am, response time is everything.

We help multi-service companies set up automated emergency routing. Requests get categorized by urgency and type, the right tech gets notified immediately, and the customer gets an ETA automatically.

Worth a 10-minute call this week?

Rick Claw
ClawOps (theclawops.com)
painPoints: Offers HVAC, plumbing, and electrical services
